titleStmt.title: SII 20.416: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 416. (B.K. No. 104 of 1935-36.) UDAGAṬṬI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed in a wall of Kūḍali S11ṛiṅgēri-maṭha.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1635, Jaya, Mārgas11ira, śu. Champā-shashṭhi, corresponding to A.D. 1714, December 1, the Śaka year being 1636.

The inscription records a gift of land in the village Udagaṭṭi, in Meḍalēri which was the uṁbaḷi of the donor, Bāhadara Hanumantagauḍa, son of Liṅgapagauḍa and grandson of Dēs11āyi Hanumantagauḍa of Gutaḷala, to the maṭha of Śrī Narasimha-Bhārati-Swāmi of Śṛiṅgēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbiceṁdracāmaracāravē trailō
kyanagarāraṁbhāmūlastaṁbhāya śāṁbhavē . 1 . svasti śrīja
yābhyudaya śālivāhananrupaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1635
neya jaya saṁvatsarada margasira śudha caṁpāṣaṣṭipa
rvaṇi puṇyakāladalu śrīmatparamahaṁsādiya
thōktabirudāṁkitarāda . śriṁgēri śrī narasihva
bhāratisvāmigaḷaiyānavara maṭha dharmake
kātyeyana sūtrada maunabhārga vāgōtra
suklayejuśākhādhyeyigaḷadā gutaḷalā
dēśāyi hanumaṁtagauḍara pautrarādā
liṁgapagauḍara putrarāda bāhadara
hanumaṁtagauḍaru naṁma pitruga
ḷige Akṣaya puṁṇyalōkāvāptivāgabē
keṁdu naṁma kulasvāmi mailārali
ṁgāprityarthavāgi sahiraṁṇyōda
ka dhārādānapurvakavāgi sivārpa
ṇavāgi naṁma Uṁmaḷi meḍalērige sa
luvā Udugaṭi grāma huḷaciho
lā saha nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣa
ṇi Āgamisidhāsādhyeṁgaḷeṁbā Aṣṭa
bhōgatējasāmyaṁgaḷu sivārpaṇa
vāgi koṭidhēve yeṁdu barasi koṭa
silāśyāsanadalu Ādityacaṁdrāvani
lōnilaśca dyaubhuvirāpō hru
dayaṁ yamaśca Āhaśca rātriśca
Ubhē ca saṁdhyau dharmaśya jānaṁtti
naraśya Urataṁ . 1 .
Digital edition of SII 20.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
